settings.search_intro: This static-safe search foundation keeps the approved Mzansi Select rhythm, premium-practical typography, and commerce-card consistency in place while real search wiring remains deferred.
settings.summary_copy: Showing a curated placeholder layout for a product-led results page. Final query handling, live results, and search behaviours remain deferred to a later approved slice.
settings.empty_description: The no-results experience is now in place, but live search terms, product results, and browse recovery behaviour remain intentionally deferred.
settings.browse_copy: Browse the same trusted departments already established across the homepage and collection foundations while live search data and ranking remain out of scope for this slice.
